case_title: ERIC C. MAH VS. HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-23-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY MAH, ERIC C. HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAH, ERIC C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION $631.70 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $726.70, $631.70 COURT FINDING THAT $310.00 HELD IN BAD FAITH; PLUS $11.70 OUTSTANDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-02-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (PLAINTIFF UNAVAILABLE UNTIL END OF THE WEEK) TRIAL OF AUG-30-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,258.58 FILED BY MAH, ERIC C. AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ERIC C. MAH AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARTHA F. MCAFEE, PETITIONS SUPERVISOR FOR DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION. STELLA MAH & JOHN MAH, WITNESSES FOR PLAINTIFF, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS RETURED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 9/6/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER FOR EXAMINATION (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAH, ERIC C. SERVED MAY-02-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAH, ERIC C. AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANTS CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2017 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-06-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT CREDITOR $1,043.70 BY CHECK. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS GIVEN JUDGMENT CREDITOR A CASHIER'S CHECK FOR $631.70. IF BOTH CHECKS CLEAR, JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. . JUDGMENT CREDITOR ERIC MAH IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBITOR HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARTHA MCAFEE, SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MAH, ERIC C.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER OEX DISCHARGED. SATISFIED JUDGMENT ON FILE.
